title: Prohibitions
doc_html:
§1145. Prohibitions

            Any chemical that is not approved for agricultural application shall not be sprayed for maintenance of a solar power generation facility site.

            Acts 2025, No. 279, §1.
doc_text:
§1145.  Prohibitions
Any chemical that is not approved for agricultural application shall not be sprayed
for maintenance of a solar power generation facility site.
Acts 2025, No. 279, §1.
